However, adding another perspective, nail pitting could also potentially appear unrelated superficially because nails do not typically involve typical hair follicle pathology seen in AA. Nonetheless, nail changes often occur concomitantly with skin manifestations in many autoimmune disorders, making them closely linked clinically even though biologically separate from hair follicles themselves.
